title: Step S-SWQT-0019: HTML-first 规则、静态审计与基础语义迁移

items.statement: 建立 HTML-first 项目规则和静态审计门禁，并迁移具有明确原生等价物的基础导出组件语义。

inScope: packages/ui/AGENTS.md、设计摘要/Do-and-Don't 与研究索引中的 HTML-first 契约
静态 source policy gate：冗余 role、fake neutral control、obsolete authoring attributes 与已知语义回归
outOfScope: 复杂菜单、Combobox、Tabs、Tooltip、Dialog/Popover 的无等价重写

items.researchEvidence: docs/research/R-SWQT-0001-html-living-standard-audit.md；WHATWG HTML Living Standard；W3C ARIA in HTML。
items.optionsTelos: Option A：标准优先、兼容迁移。

items.axisPositioning: required: public-contract + semantic-element + validation；每一处替换需 DOM/API/交互证据。
items.axisSplitSnapshot: S0019 只拥有基础语义和治理；选择控件、数据表格、最终全量门禁分别由 S0020/S0021/S0022 承接。
items.temporaryArtifactLifecycle: not-applicable；验证临时输出只在系统临时目录产生，不提交。

testDrivenDesign.testCaseDesign: DOM 断言原生 progress/nav/search/th/scope/current-page；Spinner 有/无 aria-label；静态脚本用正负 fixture 验证禁用模式。
testDrivenDesign.acceptanceToTestMapping: Feature AC1-4、AC7-9 -> source gate + Portal/consumer DOM/browser/type tests；每条迁移至少一个正例，冗余 role/fake control 至少一个负例。
testDrivenDesign.riskToTestLevelMapping: public DOM contract -> typecheck + rendered DOM integration；ARIA/name behavior -> Playwright role/name assertions + Axe；source policy -> unit/static script。
testDrivenDesign.regressionTestDesign: 保持组件名与常用 props；验证 Progress value/max、Pagination/Breadcrumb accessible names、Spinner 内联不重复播报。
testDrivenDesign.coverageMetric: target-driven: every changed exported primitive has direct DOM assertion or static invariant
testDrivenDesign.residualRisk: 不同辅助技术对 progress/spinner announcement 仍可能存在差异；保留人工抽查说明。
testDrivenDesign.followUp: S0022 执行全量 rendered conformance 与 browser matrix。

items.explanationSyncBrief: 同步 package agent docs、Design Summary、Do-and-Don't 与 catalog notes，明确 native-first/ARIA-exception test。
items.problemDefinition: 当前基础组件中存在原生等价物未使用、冗余 role 和隐藏可访问文本，且无自动门禁阻止回归。
items.requirementsDefinition: 使用语义等价的 intrinsic HTML；移除与 implicit semantics 重复的 ARIA；保持公共调用主路径；加入可执行源代码规则。
nonGoals: 不更改无更强语义的布局 div/span。
不在本 Step 改写复杂复合 widget。

plainLanguage.unclear: “标准优先”容易被误解成标签替换竞赛。
plainLanguage.why: HTML 原生元素还包含浏览器行为、键盘和表单语义；错误替换可能比现状更差。
plainLanguage.outcome: 只替换有完整等价物的部分，并用测试证明 DOM 和交互更正确。
plainLanguage.prose: 先把最确定的基础问题修正，再让静态门禁守住这些规则。

options.name: 直接迁移现有导出并加 gate
options.cuttingPoint: 组件实现 + 项目治理同时收敛。
options.impact: 当前消费者获得正确 DOM；后续提交不能重引入同类问题。
options.risk: 少量 ref/props 类型差异与 CSS 原生控件样式。

options.name: 只加新组件不迁移旧组件
options.cuttingPoint: 旧表面保持，新表面另建。
options.impact: 兼容最好但语义债务继续存在。
options.rejectWhen: 目标要求改进现有导出库。

recommendedOption.rationale: 满足原始目标，且所列基础项均有明确原生/标准等价路径。
recommendedOption.assumptionsFromFeature: migrate-forward；允许 DOM 实现变化但不静默破坏常用调用。

granularity.whySmallEnough: 共享同一基础语义/静态 gate 不变量，可在一次实现中形成首个端到端闭环。
granularity.whyNotSplitFurther: 逐组件拆分会重复同一 source gate、docs 与 browser fixture，无独立 review 价值。
granularity.splitSignals: 若 Progress 类型迁移需要大版本 API，立即拆出兼容 Step。

readiness.reason: 规则、目标组件、测试映射和兼容边界均已确定。

forwardImpact.resolution: 最终 gate 消费本 Step 新增 source policy 与 DOM assertions。

executionContract.expectedChangeSurface: 基础导出组件、HTML-first package 文档、静态 standards gate、Portal 代表性 DOM 测试与 CI。
executionContract.acceptanceCriteria: 原生 progress；移除 nav/search 的冗余 role 与 BreadcrumbPage 假 link；省略号文本可读；Spinner 默认装饰；TableHead 默认 scope=col；静态门禁可阻止回归。
executionContract.validationEvidenceRequired: source gate、design/catalog gate、Portal DOM/Axe browser test、类型基线记录。
executionContract.rollbackNotes: 可逐组件恢复实现；删除静态门禁时需同时恢复 CI 和文档引用。

implementationSummary.whatChanged: Progress 改为原生 progress[value][max] 并保持组件名；清理 Pagination/SearchInput/Breadcrumb 冗余或伪语义；Spinner 默认 aria-hidden、显式 label 时可播报；SkeletonStack 隐藏纯视觉占位；TableHead 默认 scope=col；新增 HTML-first 文档、静态脚本、CI gate 与 Portal DOM/Axe 回归。
implementationSummary.whySatisfiesStep: 基础导出组件现在依赖浏览器原生语义，项目规则和可执行门禁共同阻止已确认反模式回归。
implementationSummary.intentionallyUnchanged: 保留复杂 Radix widget；不处理 PopoverSelect、DateRangePresetPicker 和 ServerDataTable，它们由后续 Step 承接。

changeSurface.dataOrMigrationAnchors: 移除 @radix-ui/react-progress peer 声明；无需数据迁移。

executionNotes.decisionsDuringImplementation: Spinner 默认作为装饰图标，调用方可通过 aria-label 获得 status；SkeletonStack 作为纯视觉占位隐藏；原生 progress 通过浏览器伪元素保持视觉 token。
executionNotes.deviationsFromBrief: 无范围偏离；浏览器测试首次因 locator 过宽和 demo 未包含 ellipsis 失败，已收窄 locator 并补代表性 demo。
executionNotes.risksDiscovered: 原生 progress 的浏览器伪元素样式需要最终全量视觉回归；consumer typecheck 仍被既有 source-highlight 字面量类型错误阻塞。

validationReferences.notes: light/dark 2/2 passed；覆盖原生 DOM、implicit role、当前页和 Axe。
9 个既有 packages/ui/src/lib/source-highlight.tsx literal-type errors；与本 Step 修改无重叠。

blocker.reason: 本 Step 范围的 source/browser/design/catalog 证据通过；已知 typecheck baseline 记录为后续全量验收残余。
blocker.recoveryTrigger: 若最终 gate 发现本 Step touched-file 新错误，回到 implement。
blocker.residualRisk: 原生 progress 跨浏览器视觉差异由 S-SWQT-0022 全量 browser matrix 验证。

items.projectFactUpdateCandidates: update-now: check:html-standards 已加入 root scripts、CI 与 package agent docs。

gateOutcomes.evidence: Diff limited to the designed foundational components, policy/docs, source gate, CI, and representative Portal demo/test; Step status=implemented and workflow-json passed.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: inspected git diff/check and Step document for unrelated refactors or missing records; none found.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Native Progress changes its ref target from div-like Radix Root to HTMLProgressElement under migrate-forward.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Feature links WHATWG HTML Living Standard, HTML element/attribute/obsolete indexes, W3C ARIA in HTML, retrieval date and refresh triggers; full implementation-ready brief present.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: checked that the policy does not claim every neutral container or ARIA widget must be replaced.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Living-standard changes require periodic refresh rather than a frozen version assertion.

gateOutcomes.evidence: check:html-standards, design contract and catalog gate passed; targeted Portal DOM/Axe test passed in light/dark; change-posture and workflow-json passed.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: first browser runs exposed an over-broad locator and missing ellipsis demo; both were corrected and rerun successfully.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: No standalone coverage artifact exists; accepted skipped-with-reason(project uses target-driven DOM/static evidence). Full browser matrix remains in S-SWQT-0022.

gateOutcomes.evidence: check:html-standards is mounted in root package scripts and CI; package AGENTS/README link shipped docs/HTML-STANDARDS.md.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: verified all linked files exist and package files include docs.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Portal synchronized copies are generated and will be checked in final validation.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Step sourceFeature points to F-SWQT-0007; research is linked from Feature and repository research index; stable package docs avoid temporary workflow paths.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: no stale future-only wording or temporary artifact references remain.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Implementation and validation records are complete; no unresolved Step-local blocker; project fact update was applied now.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: consumer typecheck baseline has 9 pre-existing source-highlight errors outside touched code and is explicitly deferred to final scope review rather than hidden.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Feature-wide typecheck cannot be declared passed until final review resolves or formally accepts that baseline.

conditionalGates.siblingRepeatedSkipRollup: not-applicable(first sibling; final Step owns shared full-suite rollup)

items.projectCompanionFactDisposition: update-now: root command, CI entry, and package agent documentation already updated.
items.ssotImpactPrerequisite: passed: package HTML-STANDARDS.md is the new public authoring contract; source workflow and standards references are recorded.
items.residualRisk: Progress ref/DOM and cross-browser styling receive full browser/build/packed-consumer verification in S-SWQT-0022.
items.followUp: Promote this Step, then execute native form controls in S-SWQT-0020.

items.finalDocumentEntry: .sw/workflow/steps/S-SWQT-0019-html-first-规则-静态审计与基础语义迁移.json
items.validationSummary: HTML standards/design/catalog passed；Portal targeted DOM/Axe browser 2/2 passed；consumer typecheck baseline is explicitly carried to S-SWQT-0022.
items.testCaseSummary: 原生 progress、implicit role、Breadcrumb current page、ellipsis 可访问文本在 light/dark Portal 浏览器测试通过。
items.coverageSummary: target-driven touched components covered by static invariants plus representative DOM/Axe integration；standalone coverage artifact skipped-with-reason(project has no coverage target).
items.rootMount: Root README -> packages/ui/README.md -> docs/HTML-STANDARDS.md；stable Step path retained in workflow ledger.
items.archiveSynchronization: implemented(stable Layout v3 Step path; ledger refreshed by controlled writes)

requirementAudit.requirement: 基础导出组件采用可用的标准元素和属性
requirementAudit.evidence: 原生 progress、implicit roles、current page、scope=col 与装饰 loading semantics 已落地并测试。
package public docs、root script 和 CI gate 已挂载。
requirementAudit.followUp: 标准或浏览器支持策略变化时刷新研究与 gate。

items.workflowRunAudit: discourse/design/implement/review 已完成；两次 targeted browser 初跑暴露测试定位/fixture 缺口并已复跑通过；一次非法 lifecycle transition 通过 step.transition 合法路径恢复。
items.intermediateDocumentStateAudit: Feature step-breakdown、Step implementation/review/promotion sections、stable path 与 ledger 由 workflow tools 同步。
items.documentGovernanceAudit: Root/package README、package AGENTS 与 shipped HTML-STANDARDS.md 形成可达文档树；研究记录留在 repository research index。
items.ssotProjectionAudit: ssot-updated: package authoring contract、root command 与 CI 已当前化并回指本 workflow。
items.temporaryArtifactLifecycle: 所有 .sw 中本 Step 临时 fixture 在 promotion 后删除；不触碰非本 Step 文件。
items.acceptanceToAuthorityPropagation: 基础语义验收已传播到 source、Portal test、package docs、CI、Feature/Step；选择控件/数据表/全量验证保持 future-only，由 S0020-S0022 持有。

closingTriad.question: 确认范围内是否仍有未实现或未登记工作？
closingTriad.answer: 否（本 Step 范围）；S0020-S0022 是已登记的后续 sibling，不属于遗漏。
closingTriad.evidence: Step scope + Feature step-breakdown + implementation/review records

closingTriad.question: 文档、registry、ledger 与 stable path 是否一致？
closingTriad.evidence: finalDocumentEntry + package doc tree + controlled workflow ledger

closingTriad.question: 声明的行为是否有足够验证及残余风险处置？
closingTriad.evidence: source/design/catalog gates + targeted light/dark DOM/Axe test；全量验证交给 S0022

closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditEvidence: 本 Step requirements、文档树、registry/path 与验证证据均闭合。
closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditConsistency: 与 review decision=reviewed 和 future sibling 边界一致。
closingSelfAudit.pluginSkillFriction: lifecycle 必须经过 implementing/reviewing 中间态，已由合法 intent 恢复；无需方法论捕获。
closingSelfAudit.reusableWorkflowPattern: HTML source invariant + rendered DOM/Axe split gate

items.requiredFollowUp: 继续 auto 链执行 S-SWQT-0020、S-SWQT-0021、S-SWQT-0022。

validationSummary: HTML standards/design/catalog passed; targeted Portal DOM/Axe browser 2/2 passed; typecheck baseline carried to final scope
